$note: Project settings for the auto-editor repo. Hooks give the agent auto-context each session (status.py) and protect raw media (guard_raw.py). To reduce permission prompts for the media toolchain, run /fewer-permission-prompts or add Bash(ffmpeg:*), Bash(ffprobe:*), Bash(yt-dlp:*), Bash(magick:*), Bash(sox:*) to permissions.allow yourself. AUTOEDITOR_PY = full path to Python 3.12 (its Scripts dir isn't on PATH).
